description: Create a schematic metro map in EdrawMax for a Boston transit expansion proposal showing the intersection of the 'Blue Line' and a new 'Silver Line' extension. The 'Blue Line' (blue) must include Aquarium, Maverick, and Airport Station. The 'Silver Line' (gray/silver) must include Design Center, World Trade Center, Airport Station, and Terminal A, intersecting the Blue Line at Airport Station. Use standard metro station symbols for regular stops and a transfer/interchange symbol for the intersection. Lines should follow 45-degree or 90-degree angles. Include the title 'Airport Transit Expansion Proposal' and a legend. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/boston_metro_map.eddx and export the map to /home/ga/Documents/boston_metro_map.png. Dismiss any 'Account Login' or 'File Recovery' dialogs on startup.
